subcodes.first_line: O fresh sapling of the divine garden! Though until now I have not outwardly written thee a letter, yet the Blessed Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهال تازه بوستان الهی هر چند بظاهر تا بحال نامه بتو ننگاشته ام ولی جمال مبارک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
